Comfortable Accommodations: Heidi's Guesthouse in Siquijor offers family rooms with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and tiled floors. Each room includes a balcony with an inner courtyard or quiet street view, a wardrobe, and a sofa.
Essential Facilities: Guests enjoy a sun terrace and free WiFi. The property provides private check-in and check-out services, car hire, and luggage storage. An outdoor dining area and seating area enhance the stay.
Prime Location: Siquijor Port Beach is a 5-minute walk away. Sibulan Airport is 28 km from the guest house.
